JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

THE SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT SHALL BE FILED ON OR BEFORE JUNE 22, 2020. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A.
